title: [codereview] bench-operations.md Heltec section needs full rewrite for non-destructive console
description: Current docs/bench-operations.md:65 references the reset-destructive behavior (lora_ipv6_mesh-9ia2). After implementing overlay + external UART, rewrite the port-safety rule, add subsection §2.x 'Non-destructive Heltec console monitoring' with build command using DTC_OVERLAY_FILE pointing to overlay snippet, pinout diagram for GPIO6/7, test procedure (python serial open with dtr=rts=False, check uptime !=0 in logs, no reset), and update CDC map if needed. Also address the ROM-loader SHA-256 warning. All findings must be fixed. Discovered-from lora_ipv6_mesh-9ia2.
close_reason: Rewrote Heltec port-safety rule and added full §2.4 Non-destructive Heltec console monitoring subsection in docs/bench-operations.md:1-250 with overlay snippet, GPIO6/7 pinout, python serial test proc (dtr/rts=False, uptime check), ROM-loader note, updated CDC map. 3 codereview passes completed internally with all findings addressed (P0-P4). Verified with manual markdown parse and cross-check against lora_ipv6_mesh-9ia2 close evidence (UART1 migration). All points fixed.
